title: Notion Vault Sync
description: Refreshes doctrine pages, pulls decision updates, and republishes approved source-of-truth entries into the Cortex knowledge surface.
architecture: A scheduled trigger starts the sync runner, pulls the latest Notion documents, normalizes the payload, then updates the local workflow registry and the knowledge snapshot.

title: Reward Budget Audit
description: Checks recurring automation spend, flags retry storms, and publishes a concise approval packet for blocked operations.
architecture: The scheduler launches the audit command, compares current spend against the baseline, writes evidence to the audit stream, and exposes an approval-ready summary for operations.
